title: Add Tooltips and Salesforce Launch Button to Object Detail
story: As a Salesforce administrator using DataTools Pro, I want a cloud icon that opens the Salesforce Object Manager for the current object in a new window, and I want informative tooltips on action icons, so that I can quickly navigate to Salesforce admin screens without manually constructing URLs.
description:
Two enhancements were added to the object detail view:

1. **Salesforce Launch Icon**: A new cloud icon opens the Salesforce Object Manager detail page for the currently viewed object in a new browser tab. The URL is constructed by concatenating the user's Salesforce instance URL (already stored in the database) with the object's `object_identifier` value: `{instance_url}/lightning/setup/ObjectManager/{object_identifier}/Details/view`.

2. **Refresh Icon Tooltip**: The existing refresh button now displays a tooltip: 'Click to refresh and pull the latest fields from Salesforce.'
acceptance_criteria: A cloud icon appears in the object detail header area
Clicking the cloud icon opens Salesforce Object Manager for that object in a new browser tab
The Salesforce URL is correctly constructed using the stored instance URL and object identifier
The cloud icon has a tooltip: 'Click to open Salesforce object manager'
The refresh icon has a tooltip: 'Click to refresh and pull the latest fields from Salesforce'
ux_changes: Added a Salesforce cloud icon that launches the Object Manager in a new tab, plus tooltips on both the new cloud icon and the existing refresh icon.
middleware_changes: Retrieves the Salesforce instance URL and object identifier from the database to construct the Object Manager deep link.
implementation_notes: The Salesforce instance URL is already captured during authentication and stored in the database. The object_identifier field from the source_object table is used for the Object Manager URL path segment. The implementation uses the existing data without requiring additional API calls.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed the instance URL was already in the database, added the icon and link. Product owner requested a specific tooltip text for the refresh button. Developer updated the tooltip text accordingly.
